headline: With GOJO acquisition finalized, company rebrands as Clorox Purell
summary: GOJO Industries is being rebranded Clorox Purell after its acquisition by The Clorox Company.

raw.headline: With GOJO acquisition finalized, company rebrands as Clorox Purell

headline: Deutsche Bank Notes “Widespread Pressures,” Cuts Clorox (CLX) Price Outlook
summary: The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) is included among the 13 Best Diversified Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 30, Deutsche Bank lowered its price recommendation on The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) to $101 from $112. It reiterated a Hold rating on the shares. The firm pointed to “legitimate and widespread pressures building” across much of […]
